overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character in a brown coat and hat walking across a wooden railway bridge over a rocky creek in a forested valley. The character pauses to observe the water below, continues walking as a horse rider passes by, then exits onto a dirt path through a grassy meadow.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden railway bridge over rocky creek

events.description: character stops walking and turns to look over the railing at the creek below
character resumes walking forward along the bridge

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across a wooden bridge, pausing to observe the flowing water and rocks in the creek below before continuing

entered.detail: weathered wooden railway bridge with planks and railings crossing a valley
dark wooden fence railings lining both sides of the bridge
dense evergreen trees surrounding the valley on both sides
wooden utility poles with crossbars running parallel to the bridge
shallow creek with clear water flowing over rocks and boulders

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a weathered wooden railway bridge spanning a rocky creek in a pine forest valley. The camera follows from behind as the character pauses to look over the railing at the water below, then continues walking. Telegraph poles line the left side of the bridge against a backdrop of partly cloudy skies.

events.description: rider on horseback passes by going in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk across the bridge as the valley view opens up on the left

notable_agents.action: rider on brown horse trotting across the bridge in the opposite direction

entered.detail: large gray rock outcropping and cliff visible beyond the bridge railing
expansive view of the forested valley opening up in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking along the bridge as the landscape opens up to reveal a dramatic view of the forested valley and rock cliffs on the left. A rider on horseback passes by going the opposite direction. The bridge continues through the pine forest with telegraph poles lining the route.

scene_state.functional_zone: dirt trail through grassy meadow and pine forest

events.description: character steps off the wooden bridge onto a dirt path

agents.ego_description: stepping off the bridge onto a dirt trail and continuing through the grassy meadow

entered.detail: muddy dirt trail leading away from the bridge into the forest
tall green grass and wildflowers lining both sides of the dirt path

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the end of the bridge and steps onto a dirt footpath cutting through a grassy meadow. The wooden bridge and rock cliffs fall behind as the character continues along the trail surrounded by tall pine trees and telegraph poles stretching into the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a weathered railway bridge crossing a rocky creek into an open, grassy meadow. It begins by following a character in a brown coat as they pause to look over the railing at the water below, with telegraph poles lining the path against a partly cloudy sky. As the character continues forward, the landscape expands to reveal dramatic rock cliffs and a forested valley, while a rider on horseback passes by in the opposite direction. The scene then shifts as the character reaches the end of the wooden structure and steps onto a dirt footpath. Finally, the bridge and cliffs recede into the background as the camera follows the character through a meadow surrounded by tall pine trees and distant utility poles.
